alias.description: Specifies the alias for the directory, which must be unique within the AWS account and region.

connect_settings.description: Defines the configuration for a directory's connection settings, including VPC information and subnet IDs, required for creating a Simple AD or Microsoft AD directory.
connect_settings.type: list(object({availability_zones: optional(list(string)),connect_ips: optional(list(string)),customer_dns_ips: list(string),customer_username: string,subnet_ids: list(string),vpc_id: string}))

description.description: Specifies a textual description for the directory, providing additional context or information; optional but useful for identification.

desired_number_of_domain_controllers.description: Specifies the number of domain controllers for the directory, must be between 2 and 20.

edition.description: Specifies the edition of the directory, such as Standard or Enterprise; must align with the intended use case and supported AWS Directory Service options.

enable_sso.description: Indicates whether single sign-on (SSO) is enabled for the directory; set to true to enable SSO functionality.

name.description: Specifies the name of the directory; must be unique within the AWS account and comply with naming conventions.

password.description: Password for the directory administrator account; must meet the AWS Directory Service complexity requirements.

short_name.description: Specifies the short name of the directory, used for identifying resources within the directory; must be unique within the directory and is required for certain configurations.

size.description: Defines the desired size for the directory, specifying either 'Small' or 'Large' based on the expected performance and capacity requirements.

tags.description: Key-value pairs for tagging the resource; used for categorization and identification purposes.

timeouts.description: Specifies the duration for each phase of the directory service lifecycle, including create, update, and delete operations.

type.description: Specifies the type of directory to create, such as 'SimpleAD' or 'MicrosoftAD'; must be a valid Directory Service type.

vpc_settings.description: Configuration block that specifies the VPC and subnets for the directory, requiring at least two subnets in different Availability Zones.
